name: aliexpress-shopper
description: Browser-driven AliExpress shopping assistant for Claude in Chrome. Bundles userscripts (Find Similar, Hide Combo Deals) and skills/commands that drive aliexpress.com directly in the user's browser session — search, read current listing, compare open tabs, apply filters, hide bundles, and find similar items. Scope is global aliexpress.com (any locale/currency) and visual/interactive shopping, not headless scraping or programmatic API flows.
